title: uShader golf profile
description: A .ushaderprofile file: a saved set of pass toggles, a protected-names list, and a budget preset, as written and read by uShader's ui/golf_profile.cpp. See docs/ushaderprofile-schema.md in the uShader repository for the full human-readable specification, including field-by-field semantics and the schema version history.

schema_version.description: The .ushaderprofile format version this file was written against. Introduced in schema version 1 (Phase 21); files written before Phase 21 omit this field entirely and MUST be read as schema_version 1. Readers should treat a missing field as 1, not as an error.

aggressive.description: Master toggle for the 16 aggressive passes below. When false, uShader ignores every other pass toggle in this file and runs only the always-on baseline (identifier renaming, numeric literal shortening, whitespace stripping).

protected_names.description: Comma-separated list of identifiers the golfing engine must never rename. Entries are trimmed of surrounding whitespace and empty entries (e.g. from a trailing comma) are ignored. May be an empty string.

budget_preset.description: Name of the last-selected size-budget preset. Must be one of the built-in preset names uShader ships (src/ui/budget_presets.cpp); an unrecognized or missing name falls back to no budget selected ("Custom") rather than failing to load the file.
